title: Sysmon C2 Beacon - Periodic Outbound HTTPS
description: Detects periodic outbound HTTPS connections to non-standard destinations that may indicate C2 beaconing activity. Suspicious processes making repeated connections to external IPs on port 443 are flagged.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Destination Port' = 443 or 'Destination Port' = 8443 or 'Destination Port' = 4443)) and (('Process Name' like '*\rundll32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\regsvr32.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\certutil.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\bitsadmin.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\msiexec.exe')) and (Initiated = 'true') and not (('Destination IP' like '10.*' or 'Destination IP' like '172.16.*' or 'Destination IP' like '192.168.*' or 'Destination IP' like '127.*')))
